summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 46 - Geo Data Population & Enrollment Page Fixes. All 6 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified: enrollment page routing (no website navbar), 70px header bar, proper label spacing, CMS geo manager with breadcrumb navigation.
seed_data_creation: Geo data populated via pycountry (249 countries, 5046+ states) and geonamescache (32423 cities)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 geo and enrollment fixes fully tested. Geo data is populated with real-world data. Enrollment page routing fixed - /membership-enrollment is extracted outside Navbar/Footer wrapper. CMS geo manager at /admin/geo works with breadcrumb navigation.

backend_apis.GET /api/geo/countries: PASS - Returns 249 real countries with id, name, code, alpha3
backend_apis.DELETE /api/admin/geo/countries/{id}: PASS - Deletes country and cascades to states/cities
backend_apis.DELETE /api/admin/geo/states/{id}: PASS - Deletes state and cascades to cities

frontend_enrollment_page.No website navbar: PASS - /membership-enrollment does NOT show main website navbar
frontend_enrollment_page.Label spacing: PASS - Labels have mb-2.5 (10px) margin-bottom for clear spacing
frontend_enrollment_page.Form fields present: PASS - 7 fields in Step 1 (invite_code, firstname, lastname, email, password, confirm_password, summary_bio)
frontend_enrollment_page.Footer present: PASS - Enrollment page has its own footer

cms_geo_manager.Countries list: PASS - Shows 249 countries with search, edit, delete
cms_geo_manager.States drill-down: PASS - Click country shows states (57 for US)
cms_geo_manager.Cities drill-down: PASS - Click state shows cities (246 for Florida)
cms_geo_manager.Breadcrumb navigation: PASS - Countries > United States > Florida navigation works
cms_geo_manager.Edit/Delete buttons: PASS - Each row has edit and delete buttons
cms_geo_manager.Sidebar link: PASS - 'Countries, States, Cities' link under System section
